items.body_excerpt:
Along with Robert Williams III, The Stein Line notes that the Celtics are interested in free agent Kevon Looney.

Primarily due to a knee injury, Looney only appeared in 21 games last season.

He averaged 2.8 points & 5.6 rebounds in 14.7 minutes of floor time.

items.title: "Masters of the Universe" is not the worst movie I've seen, by far.
items.author: Jon Hamm
items.body_excerpt:
"Masters of the Universe" is not the worst movie I've seen, by far.

Also not the best movie I've seen, by far.

But it hit all the proper nostalgia places for this 50-year-old. I wouldn't mind if a sequel was made and the universe was expanded. Oh, and re-cast Skeletor while you're at it.

items.title: With Buddy Hield on the books at his full $9.6M salary, the Atlanta Hawks are roughly $7.1M under the luxury tax and $15.1M under the first apron. The Hawks have one open roster spot.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
With Buddy Hield on the books at his full $9.6M salary, the Atlanta Hawks are roughly $7.1M under the luxury tax and $15.1M under the first apron. The Hawks have one open roster spot.

This factors in the Aaron Wiggins trade, plus both first-round draft picks.

items.title: Dissecting the Value of the Miles Bridges Trade + Expanding the Giannis Trade
items.author: Third Apron
items.body_excerpt: 2026 free agency hasn’t begun yet, but we’ve already seen a ton of movement on the trade market. So far, there have been five significant veteran trades. Two of them were dissected last week on Third Apron. None of these deals is official yet and likely won’t be until July 6 at…

items.title: blento.app is an interesting Bluesky app that can be used kind of like linktree. You can customize your own page by adding “cards” such as links, images, a feed of your recent blog posts, text, and even games like Tetris to your page. Change color, size, placement. Takes minutes
items.author: Hoop Informatics
items.body_excerpt: blento.app is an interesting Bluesky app that can be used kind of like linktree. You can customize your own page by adding “cards” such as links, images, a feed of your recent blog posts, text, and even games like Tetris to your page. Change color, size, placement. Takes minutes to make.

images.alt: A screenshot of creating my blue to by adding cards. The screenshot shows the profile for Hoop Informatics showing cards or links for YouTube, Substack, and leaflet, a card for recent blog posts, a photo of Alex Caruso and Lisa Simpson mean mugging her brother Bart
